subjectAreas.name: Jesus, the Gospels and Acts
subjectAreas.description: Covers the canonical Gospels, Acts, historical study of Jesus, traditions about his birth, teachings, death, burial, and resurrection, and other New Testament figures.

subjectAreas.name: Paul and the Epistles
subjectAreas.description: Covers Paul's life, mission, communities, letters, theology, ethics, and the broader collection of New Testament epistles.

subjectAreas.name: Early Christian History
subjectAreas.description: Covers Christian origins, early expansion, canonical and non-canonical writings, persecution, martyrdom, church history, and the church fathers.

subjectAreas.name: Christian Theology and Belief
subjectAreas.description: Covers Christian understandings of Christ, salvation, orthodoxy and heresy, suffering and evil, faith, doubt, and nonbelief.

subjectAreas.name: Afterlife, Revelation, and Supernatural Claims
subjectAreas.description: Covers beliefs about life after death, the Book of Revelation and the end times, miracles, visions, and other supernatural claims.

subjectAreas.name: Ethics and Social Issues
subjectAreas.description: Covers moral reasoning, wealth, poverty, charity, women, gender, sexuality, and related biblical and Christian social questions.

subjectAreas.name: Hebrew Bible, Early Judaism, and Ancient Context
subjectAreas.description: Covers Hebrew Bible texts and traditions, early Jewish groups and beliefs, and the wider social, political, and religious setting of the ancient world.

subjectAreas.name: Texts, Manuscripts, and Methods
subjectAreas.description: Covers how ancient texts were transmitted, remembered, written, attributed, collected, copied, evaluated, translated, and studied using historical and textual methods.

subjectAreas.name: Books, Scholarship, and the Blog
subjectAreas.description: Covers Bart's books, teaching, media appearances, academic life, public debates, recurring blog features, and personal posts.
categories: Academic Life, Scholars, and Public Debate
